narrative:
Cols 37-D (precinct in Franklin County) has 828 registered voters, with 67.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 15.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 16.9%, a narrow Democratic lean of 1.4 percentage points.
